Class ECJSourceLoaderImpl

java.lang.Object
com.ibm.wala.classLoader.ClassLoaderImpl
com.ibm.wala.cast.java.loader.JavaSourceLoaderImpl
com.ibm.wala.cast.java.translator.jdt.ecj.ECJSourceLoaderImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
IClassLoader
public class ECJSourceLoaderImpl extends JavaSourceLoaderImpl

    Description
    protected class 
    JavaSourceLoaderImpl.AbstractJavaMethod
    DOMO representation of an abstract (body-less) method on a Java type that resides in a source file
    class 
    JavaSourceLoaderImpl.ConcreteJavaMethod
    DOMO representation of a concrete method (which has a body) on a Java type that resides in a source file
    static class 
    JavaSourceLoaderImpl.InstructionFactory
     
    class 
    JavaSourceLoaderImpl.JavaClass
    WALA representation of a Java class residing in a source file
    protected class 
    JavaSourceLoaderImpl.JavaEntityMethod
    Generic DOMO representation of a method on a Java type that resides in a source file
    protected static class 
    JavaSourceLoaderImpl.JavaField
    WALA representation of a field on a Java type that resides in a source file
